entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop being studied for aflatoxin contamination and resistance.

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The presence of aflatoxins in groundnut seeds, posing a serious problem in producing countries.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The international research organization conducting the Groundnut Improvement Program.

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: The toxigenic fungus responsible for seed invasion, colonization, and aflatoxin production in groundnut.

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO SEED INVASION
entities.description: The ability of groundnut cultivars to prevent the entry of Aspergillus flavus into the seed.

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO COLONIZATION
entities.description: The ability of groundnut cultivars to prevent the growth and spread of Aspergillus flavus within the seed.

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO AFLATOXIN PRODUCTION
entities.description: The ability of groundnut cultivars to limit the amount of aflatoxin produced by Aspergillus flavus.

entities.name: SCREENING
entities.description: The process of evaluating groundnut cultivars for resistance in the field under natural and inoculated conditions.

relationships.description: is the agent against which resistance is measured
